title.en: Qin Yu was quite excited in his heart.

content.en:
"I didn't expect to find another weak Eternal Sea!"

Qin Yu was quite excited in his heart.

The immeasurable sea is the eternal sea, and the source sea is also the eternal sea.

And there was not only one Eternal Sea that he knew, but all of them were very powerful, and it was the first time he had seen the Eternal Sea, which was as strong as the Source Sea and only a few Legendary Realm Lords

Such an Eternal Sea must be very young, although the resources born may not be many, but once you control such an Eternal Sea and develop your own strength, even if you are born in the future, even if you lack some precious resources, such as the Eternal Treasure, you can fall into your own hands.

This is the great opportunity!

What's more, it is still possible to obtain two Eternal Arcana.

As a powerful Qin family in the Infinite Sea, there are not many Eternal Treasures, and as the young master of the Qin family, he has only been given one Eternal Treasure, if he can obtain a few more Eternal Treasures, his strength will increase significantly

"This time I was lucky, fortunately I caught the Dark Mist Lord in time, otherwise, this kind of opportunity would not have been able to fall into my hands, and those Perfection Realm and even Realm Realm Legendary Lords would probably want to come to this 08. Qin Yu said secretly.

From the mouth of the Dark Mist Lord, I learned that the Legendary Realm Lords in the Origin Sea Space-Time Territory were relatively weak, almost all of them were ordinary Legendary Lords, and at most there was only one Origin Realm Legendary Lord.

And this time, he brought eighteen ordinary Legendary Lords, three Origin Realm Lords, plus one of his own top-notch Origin Realm Legendary Lords who was comparable to the Perfection Realm Legendary Lords, which was enough to occupy the Source Sea and make many Eternal Realms surrender.

When he completely occupies the Source Sea, he will establish a time and space ladder to connect the Infinite Sea, and it will be very easy to travel between the Source Sea and the Infinite Sea at that time, and he can even dispatch strong people from the Qin family to guard this place at any time to ensure that this place will not be taken away by other forces.

Another period of time has passed.

this day.

The Lord of Dark Mist took Qin Yu and these legendary lords to an area outside the space-time territory, where they could perceive space-time territories one after another.

"It's really another eternal sea, but the structure is a little different from the immeasurable sea, these resources of the source sea are mainly concentrated in the space-time territory, and the origin energy of the source sea feeds the space-time territory, while our immeasurable sea has given birth to countless immeasurable islands by itself, and the immeasurable islands are floating in the immeasurable sea. "

Qin Yu muttered.

Whoa!!!

These Legendary Realm Lords instantly crossed this void region and descended to the space-time territory.

At this time, Qin Yu ordered, "Lord of Dark Mist, take me to your Lord Alliance headquarters." "

The Dark Mist Lord said in a low voice: "Young Master Qin Yu, shouldn't we go and kill Ye Tian, this person has five clones, once he is allowed to escape, I am afraid it will not be good." "

"My order, do you want to disobey it, besides, a mere Immortal Realm Lord is not worth mentioning, if I take care of my affairs, I will help you destroy him. If you talk nonsense any more, you know the consequences. Qin Yu said impatiently.

The Dark Mist Lord's expression changed drastically, and he suddenly didn't dare to speak.

Although Qin Yu broke his promise, his strength was too weak to resist Qin Yu at all, even if Qin Yu really didn't help him, he was helpless.

In fact, Qin Yu didn't care about the so-called promise at all, after all, the Dark Mist Lord didn't have much value to him now.

However, Ye Tian was definitely going to kill, after all, Ye Tian was very likely to contain an eternal treasure in his hand that could increase his strength, otherwise he would not be able to defeat the Dark Mist Lord of the Legendary Realm Lord at the Immortal Realm level.

However, he had to control the Lord Alliance first, and then deal with Ye Tian.

Other than that.

As for whose hands it fell into, as long as he controlled the lord alliance here, he would be able to find out when the time came.

Right now, controlling the Alliance of Lords is the most important thing.

Whoa!!

Qin Yu shuttled to the headquarters of the Lords Alliance with many Legendary Realm Lords.

Rumble!!!!

One after another, the aura of the Legendary Realm Lords spread, suddenly causing many Eternal Realms in the Lords' Alliance to tremble.

And at this time, the Holy Peak Lord, the Ice Han Lord, the Taihuang Lord, the Aurora Lord, and the Six Yang Lords appeared one after another.

"So many Legendary Lords !!"

The Holy Peak Lord's expression changed drastically, and his expression was incredulous.

How could the Space-Time Territory have had so many Legendary Lords?, and they were all fresh faces, definitely not from the Space-Time Territory.

Moreover, the Holy Peak Lord also saw an acquaintance from among these legendary lords, the Lord of the Dark Mist.

As you can almost guess, these Legendary Lords were brought by the Darkmist Lord, and may have come from something similar to the Source Sea, such as the Immeasurable Sea.

After all, there are several relics from the Infinite Sea in the space-time territory, so it is very likely that these people are from the Infinite Sea.

"You are the five legendary lords of the Source Sea Space-Time Territory Lords Alliance, from today on, your Space-Time Territory Lords Alliance will serve me, I am from the Infinite Sea Qin family, my name is Qin Yu, also known as the True Yu Lord, but I prefer people to call me Young Master Qin Yu. "

Qin Yu said.

"What serves you?"

The faces of the five legendary lords immediately showed a look of warm anger, but due to the strength of Qin Yu and the others, they did not act rashly.

At this time, the Lord of Ice Han secretly informed Ye Tian.

The space-time territory is not without the power of a battle, after all, these legendary lords who arrived from the Infinite Sea 107 did not come with a clone body, but must have only one body.

And the five major lords on the side of the space-time territory plus Ye Tian's copy body are not weaker than Qin Yu's side in terms of quantity.

As long as Ye Tian can defeat Qin Yu, he will have the right to speak.

In short, it is impossible to serve Qin Yu.

As Legendary Realm Lords, Ice Han Lord and the others didn't want to serve others.

-

Bloodbone Territory.

The clone of the Ice Han Lord descended here, and Ye Tian sensed it for the first time.

"Lord Binghan, I see that you are a little flustered, has something happened?" Ye Tian asked.

Lord Binghan hurriedly said: "Something is wrong, a group of legendary lords have come from the Infinite Sea, including the Dark Mist Lord, we guess that the Dark Mist Lord has found the Infinite Sea." We searched for a long time but didn't find the Infinite Sea, but we didn't expect the Lord of Dark Mist to find it. Now, these legendary lords of the Infinite Sea should be brought by the Lord of the Dark Mist, and the legendary lord headed by him is named Qin Yu, and the title is the Lord of True Yu, the strength of the other party is afraid that it is very strong, and we are not opponents. "

"You delay a minute, and I'll be there right away!"

Ye Tian said.

This matter has something to do with him, and he can't ignore it.

"I'm afraid I need to burst out of real strength this time!"

Ye Tian said darkly. _
